title: Best VPN for Streaming Netflix in 2026: What Actually Works
description: Not every VPN unblocks Netflix reliably. This guide covers which providers consistently work, why many fail, and what to look for before subscribing.
content:
## Why Most VPNs Fail Netflix

Netflix has spent years improving its VPN detection. It flags IP addresses associated with data centers and VPN providers, then blocks them. A provider that worked six months ago may be blocked today. The services that consistently bypass Netflix detection rotate IP addresses regularly and invest in server infrastructure that avoids detection.

## What Netflix Geo-Blocking Does

Netflix licenses content per country. A show available in the UK may not be licensed in the US. When you connect through a VPN, Netflix sees your server location rather than your real one. If that server is flagged, you get the proxy error. If it passes detection, you see the full library for that region.

## Which VPNs Actually Work in 2026

**NordVPN** has the most consistent track record for Netflix. Their SmartPlay technology routes streaming traffic through optimized servers. They maintain a large enough server fleet that when one IP gets blocked, traffic shifts to another without user action.

**Surfshark** is close behind. It offers cheaper pricing and unlimited device connections, making it practical for households where multiple people stream simultaneously.

**ExpressVPN** was the leader for years but has become more expensive. It still works reliably but the value has weakened against NordVPN and Surfshark.

**Proton VPN** works for Netflix and has a stronger privacy stance than the others. If privacy matters as much as streaming access, it is a solid choice.

## What to Avoid

Free VPNs rarely unblock Netflix. Their IP ranges are among the first to get flagged because they serve high traffic volumes from small IP pools. Paid providers with small server counts also struggle because they cannot rotate IPs fast enough.

## Testing Before Committing

Every major provider listed above offers a 30-day money-back guarantee. Connect to a server in the region you want, open Netflix, and verify the library before your trial expires. Run speed tests while connected to make sure the connection holds up for the resolution you watch at.
